use_cases: Displaying statistical distributions with quartile ranges and median values
Visualizing outliers and data spread for analytics dashboards
Showing population or sample statistics in research reports
Rendering financial or scientific data distributions with interactive tooltips
ai_summary: A hybrid box plot and violin plot visualization component built with Airbnb's Visx library. Combines statistical distribution display with interactive tooltips showing min, max, median, and quartile values. Supports custom data input, margins, and renders scalable visualizations for data analysis use cases.
